Sender: P. Lacau, Directeur Général du Service des Antiquités
Recipient: Monsieur E. Baraize, Directeur de Travaux du Service des Antiquités, à Dendérah (Keneh)
Brief_Summary: The Director General acknowledges receipt of a letter from Monsieur Baraize regarding the discovery of three antiquities at the Temple of Isis in Dendera and plans to visit the site around April 6th or 7th to examine the find.
English_Translation:
(Model N° 37 — [Handwritten Arabic: Form No. 37])

ANTIQUITIES SERVICE,

GENERAL DIRECTORATE.

N° 4.28/128

Attachments ———

Cairo, March 28, 1922

SUBJECT.— Antiquities brought to light at the Temple
of Isis, at Dendera.

Mr. Director of Works,

I have the honor to acknowledge receipt and
thank you for your letter of March 24th instant, N°
29I, informing me of the discovery of three anti-
quities of which you sent me the photograph.
I plan to be able to go to Dendera around April 6th
or 7th next, and examine this find on
site.

Please accept, Mr. Director, the assurance
of my distinguished consideration.

THE DIRECTOR GENERAL,
[Handwritten signature: P. Lacau]

Mr. E. Baraize,
Director of Works of the Antiquities
Service, at Dendera
[Handwritten: Keneh]

[Pencil note: (132 C)]
[Stamp: EGYP GOVER]
[Handwritten Arabic: ٤٢]
[Stamp: ANTIQUITIES DEPARTMENT / [Handwritten Arabic: مصلحة الآثار] / CAIRO OFFICE • CAIRO]
Stamps_and_Annotations: Stamp: ANTIQUITIES DEPARTMENT / مصلحة الآثار / CAIRO OFFICE • CAIRO
Confidence_Notes: The handwritten signature 'Placay' is interpreted as P. Lacau, a known Director General of the Service des Antiquités during this period. The handwritten Arabic 'أورنيك نمرة ٣٧' translates to 'Form No. 37'. The handwritten Arabic '٤٢' translates to '42'.
Full_Transcription:
(Modèle N° 37 — [Handwritten Arabic: أورنيك نمرة ٣٧])

SERVICE DES ANTIQUITÉS,

DIRECTION GÉNÉRALE.

N° 4.28/128

Pièces jointes ———

Le Caire, le 28 Mars 1922

OBJET.— Antiquités mises à jour au Temple
d'Isis, à Dendérah.

Monsieur le Directeur de Travaux,

J'ai l'honneur de vous accuser réception et de
vous remercier de votre lettre du 24 Mars courant, N°
29I, me faisant part de la découverte de trois anti-
quités dont vous m'avez transmis la photographie.
Je pense pouvoir aller à Dendérah vers le 6
ou 7 Avril prochain, et examiner cette trouvaille sur
place.

Veuillez agréer, Monsieur le Directeur, l'as-
surance de ma considération distinguée.

LE DIRECTEUR GENERAL,
[Handwritten signature: Placay]

Monsieur E. Baraize,
Directeur de Travaux du Sce
des Antiquités, à Dendérah
[Handwritten: Keneh]

[Pencil note: (132 C)]
[Stamp: EGYP GOVER]
[Handwritten Arabic: ٤٢]
[Stamp: ANTIQUITIES DEPARTMENT / [Handwritten Arabic: مصلحة الآثار] / CAIRO OFFICE • CAIRO]
